candidates.row_label: Revenues from crude oil and gas sales
candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line for the company; matches top-line revenues from core business and equals Total operating income numerically but is more specific.
Represents total operating income which in this statement equals revenues from crude oil and gas sales; included as secondary label in case of label variation over time.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not the income statement revenue figure.

final_choice.row_label: Revenues from crude oil and gas sales

variables.notes: Both candidate revenue lines share identical values; the more descriptive operating revenue line is prioritized, with the total kept as a fallback label for continuity.

candidates.why: Best representation of direct production costs (cost of sales) for an oil and gas producer; closely matches COGS concept.
Exploration-related, not strictly cost of goods sold; typically treated as separate from COGS.
Overhead/SG&A, not direct production costs.

candidates.row_label: Salary and other employee benefits expenses
candidates.why: Likely includes both production and overhead staff; more appropriate as SG&A component than pure COGS here.
Mixed overhead; not clearly direct cost of sales.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement cost line.

variables.notes: Production expenses is the clearest direct cost of producing crude oil and gas and best fits the COGS concept for this issuer.

candidates.why: Represents net other operating income/expense, not core SG&A overhead; excluded per instruction to avoid such mixed/total lines for XSGA.
Classic SG&A-type overhead line; should be included as an SG&A component.

candidates.row_label: Salary and other employee benefits expenses
candidates.why: Personnel costs that are part of operating overhead; appropriate SG&A component (excluding direct production already captured in Production expenses).
Professional fees and other operating overhead; clearly part of SG&A components.

final_choice.row_label: Salary and other employee benefits expenses

variables.notes: Selected multiple overhead component lines (G&A, salary/benefits, consultants/other) while excluding totals/mixed income lines, in line with SG&A component rules.
No research and development-related line items (e.g., R&D, research, development) appear in the income statement preview, so XRD is treated as zero.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense and fees from loans and borrowings
candidates.why: Primary interest expense line for debt financing; best match for interest expense.
Additional specific interest expense on shareholder loans; valid alternative label over time.
Covers other interest-related costs; appropriate as backup interest expense label.
Debt principal on balance sheet, not an expense; not suitable for XINT.
Liability balance, not interest expense.
Accrued liability, not the period expense line itself.
Current portion of debt, not the expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense and fees from loans and borrowings

variables.notes: Only income statement interest expense lines are used, ordered by generality; balance sheet debt/liability items are intentionally excluded.

candidates.why: Represents total shareholders’ equity; no separate parent/owner vs non-controlling interests lines are present, so this is the best available book equity measure.
Duplicate total equity label (case variation); useful as an alternate label over time.
A balancing line, not the substantive equity figure; should not be used when total equity is available.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line, not equity itself.
Represents total assets/liabilities plus equity, not equity alone.

variables.notes: There is no separate non-controlling interests line, so total equity is used for BE and MIB is set to zero to avoid double counting.
No line items for minority interests or non-controlling interests are present on the balance sheet, so MIB is treated as zero.
